title: ranunculus polyandrus
intro: Ranunculus polyandrus, also known as the buttercup, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Ranunculus polyandrus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
